case_title: YASINSKY, VALENTINA VS DR. IGOR YUDIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT 506)
DECLARATION OF IGOR YUDIN (CCP 116.390) & PROPOSED ORDER OF SMALL CLAIMS COURT JUDGE TRANSFERRING ACTION BEFORE JUDGMENT TO HIGHER COURT (CCP 116.390) FILED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DR. IGOR YUDIN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DR. IGOR YUDIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YASINSKY, VALENTINA AS TO DEFENDANT DR. IGOR YUDIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YASINSKY, VALENTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DR. IGOR YUDIN $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $95.00, DEPOSIT WAS NON-REFUNDABLE BY WRITTEN AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
